rulings.Case Title: IN RE; FRANK L. WONG 1990 REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner Anderson Wongs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Discovery Responses, Accounting, And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Anderson Wong's Motion for Order Compelling Discovery Responses, Accounting, and for Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Anderson's request for order compelling responses to his Request for Production of Documents, Set One is GRANTED. Dillon must provide responses within 15 days of the hearing. The request for order compelling further responses to Special Interrogatories, Set One is DENIED as untimely under C.C.P. Section 2030.300(c). The request for order compelling responses to Requests for Admission, Set Two has been withdrawn by the moving party. The request for order compelling an accounting is DENIED. Both sides' requests for monetary sanctions are DENIED. The moving party shall prepare a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on 5/20/2015.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion By Raisa Rikoshinsky To Quash Subpoena To Merrill Lynch Pierce Fenner & Smith, Inc., Propounded By Anna Samuel
rulings.Rulings: The motion to quash subpoena to Merrill Lynch Pierce Fenner & Smith is granted. The parties shall meet and confer within 15 days of this order on the following issues: (1) Narrowing the scope of the documents requested to the date range from January 2011 through the decedent's death; (2) Redacting any private information; (3) Any protective order that would mandate non-disclosure of the bank records to parties not involved in the litigation. The moving party shall prepare the proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling shall notify the court and opposing counsel no later than 5/20/2015, at 4:00 p.m.
